description: The world's first agentic swarm AI with 1 trillion parameters. Orchestrates 100 parallel agents for complex tasks.
headings: The Future of AI is Here
What if 100 agents worked for you?

sections.title: The Problem
sections.body: One agent. One task. One bottleneck. Sequential AI is holding humanity back. While you wait for one response, the world moves forward.

sections.title: The Solution
sections.body: Kimi K2.5 orchestrates up to 100 specialized agents working in parallel. Each agent handles a piece of the puzzle. Together, they solve what one agent cannot.

sections.title: The Architecture
sections.body: Mixture-of-Experts with 384 experts. Only 8 active per token. 96.8% compute savings while maintaining frontier performance.

sections.title: The Benchmarks
sections.body: 96.1% AIME 2025. 76.8% SWE-Bench. 50.2% Humanity's Last Exam. Numbers that speak louder than words.

sections.title: The Economics
sections.body: 76% cheaper than Claude Opus. 44% cheaper than GPT-5.2. Performance without the premium price tag.

sections.title: The Freedom
sections.body: Open source under Modified MIT. Self-host on your infrastructure. No vendor lock-in. Your AI, your rules.

sections.title: Agent Swarm Technology
sections.body: Automatic task decomposition. 100 specialized agents. 4.5x faster execution. Self-coordinating swarm intelligence.

sections.title: Four Operational Modes
sections.body: Instant Mode for quick responses. Thinking Mode for deep reasoning. Agent Mode for multi-step tasks. Swarm Mode for parallel execution.
